steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: Find which pair of flower types together account for exactly 2/5 of the total 700 flowers. 2/5 × 700 = 280, so the pair must sum to 280.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — Orchid and lily: 180 + 100 = 280. ✓
  • Choice B — Tulip and lily: 140 + 100 = 240 ≠ 280. ✗
  • Choice C — Orchid and Sunflower: 180 + 160 = 340 ≠ 280. ✗
  • Choice D — Tulip and Daisy: 140 + 120 = 260 ≠ 280. ✗
A is correct.
